title: Entity Slime Keep On Jumping Behavior
description: Allows the entity to continuously jump around like a slime.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• magma_cube: 5

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description: Determines the multiplier this entity's speed is modified by when jumping around.
